overview: Giant Dragonfly is a Normal-class Beast/Giant/Insect monster found in Crypt, Goblin Cave, Inferno, Ruins. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): -78 HP, 10 physical damage, 150 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 2, MaxImpactEndurance 6. 0 attacks, 0 combo chains. Elite gains 1 exclusive abilityy: Elite. Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilityy: Nightmare.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

status_effects_detail.name: Giant Dragonfly Poison
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Giant Dragonfly Poison icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Fire, Light
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Fire (-3000), Light (-3000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Elite Gains: Elite
strategies.description: Elite grade has 1 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Elite. These change the fight dynamics in Elite.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Nightmare
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 1 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Nightmare. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 400 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
